blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,399 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
